channel.title: Welcome on Sarfraz Hameed | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome on Sarfraz Hameed | Portfolio

item.title: Enterprise Healthcare Network Architecture
item.description: Architected a highly secure, multi-area OSPF network for a healthcare facility featuring VLAN segregation, strict ACLs, and a NAT-secured Server Farm.

item.title: Automated Zero-Trust IAM Onboarding Workflow
item.description: An automated system utilizing n8n and Gemini to assign Zero-Trust IAM permissions based on dynamic Google Sheets data with human-in-the-loop approvals.
